structure.note: First non-empty line is the # H1 (no YAML block). Exactly six ## sections, correct order, none added/renamed/dropped.

citations.note: Primary [1] (IBM) cited repeatedly. Supporting [2][3] both cited inline. No fabricated [N]; no orphan markers; References resolves all three entries.

faithfulness.note: Reading is a faithful condense of topic_corpus.md (definition, why-it-works/shared-context-window, classic ignore-previous-instructions example, direct-vs-indirect table, impacts, defenses, jailbreak disambiguation). No new assertions introduced. diagram.png embedded inline in Key Concepts with caption.

forward_reference.note: Only this topic + prior concepts. LLM (3.2/3.4), probabilistic (1.3), jailbreak/data-leakage/red-teams (5.5) all PRIOR-taught. Jailbreak handled as a plain sentence-form disambiguation (lines 55-57), not bolded and not in a '**term** — definition' bullet shape — no re-teach. Governance frameworks ENTIRELY ABSENT (no NIST/EO/governance mention). No deferred/adjacent concept teaching.

beginner_readability.note: LLM spelled out first use: 'Large Language Model (LLM)' (line 15). system prompt (line 21), user input (line 22), context window (line 30), direct/indirect prompt injection (table lines 46-49) all defined at first appearance. Concrete-first (envelope analogy opens Overview). No jargon dump (one new idea at a time). Plain confident register, no hedging.

formatting.note: Paragraphs <=4 sentences throughout. Numbered list for the worked-example sequence (lines 63-65). Tables for the direct-vs-indirect contrast. Bulleted lists for impacts and defenses. Inline examples present where concepts are introduced. Bold-term/plain-meaning definition shape used. No walls of prose.

scope.note: On the headline — prompt injection only. No teaching beyond title. No advanced/adjacent concept taught; jailbreak is a prior topic used only for disambiguation.

assessment_reference.note: No assessment IDs, due weeks, or grade weights in learner prose.

tone_fit.note: Direct, plain, beginner-facing register addressing 'you'. Meets the gold-example bar (2-1, 3-4 reading gold): chunked, example-rich, scannable, define-before-use.

verdict: PASS. 1365 words within [1200,1600]; ~7 min within [6,8]. No frontmatter — opens at # H1. Exactly six sections in the fixed order. Primary [1] cited; [2][3] supporting both cited; References resolves with no orphans. Faithful condense of the corpus with zero unsupported assertions; diagram.png embedded inline in Key Concepts (line 32). Forward-reference CRITICAL clean: only this topic + prior 5.1-5.5/3.x/1.3 concepts; jailbreak (prior, 5.5) appears as a plain sentence disambiguation (lines 55-57), not bolded and not in a teaching '**term** — definition' bullet; governance frameworks entirely absent. Beginner readability solid — LLM spelled out first use, all key terms defined at first appearance, <=4-sentence paragraphs, bullets/tables over prose. On-headline scope, no scope_creep. Meets the reading gold-example bar.
